rationale: The two papers share a very specific mechanism-level overlap: the cited paper’s core claim is that effort reduces guilt and helps justify indulgent (luxury) choices, while the citing paper’s central theory is that justification/guilt shapes hedonic-versus-utilitarian choice. Given this close construct and mechanism alignment in the notes (not just broad topic similarity), this citation is plausibly a substantive theory source and is not safe to treat as an obvious mention-only reference.
